name: voice-lab
description: Local-first VoxCPM2 voice cloning app for long-form narration and mastered MP3 export.

scripts.check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf .next .vercel tsconfig.tsbuildinfo output storage .voice-lab runs voice-references debug-artifacts tmp && find . -name .DS_Store -type f -delete
